commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Thus says the LORD; If heaven above can be measured, and the foundations of the earth searched out beneath, I will also cast off all the descendants of Israel for all that they have done, says the LORD. Out, experimentally, and not by philosophical hypotheses, which were little known in the days of Jeremias. (Calmet) Septuagint, "if it be made lower. "(Haydock) This is impossible; so it is that I should abandon Israel. (Theodoret) All was not faithless. (Calmet) The Israel of God embraced the gospel.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
